title: Essence 32x
description: Essence is being built out as a detailed 32x vanilla inspired resource pack. It uses vanilla Minecraft colors with extra colors that fit nicely between them.
body:
![<3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aebaf522864b5a4cf943a10a38ed79b08dbbebf.png)


The future is bright, Essence 32x is being built out with a unique, detailed orientated art style for a modern, yet still vanilla-like resource pack. It features more colors than vanilla, and takes full advantage of the higher resoultion to give amazing details to items and blocks.

This will be a long ongoing project, follow for future updates!


| Todo             | Percent Complete  |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Blocks              | 6%  |
| Items               | 30% |
| Entities            | 0%  |
| Particles & Effects | 0%  |
| Painting            | 0%  |
| Font                | 0%  |
| Misc.               | 0%  |
| PBR*                | 3%  |
  

*PBR is currently on the [patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/moblu), the first 3% of blocks available to everyone!

There will be many addons and variations of this pack, including short swords, some 3d models, and other popular addons people enjoy with vanilla Minecraft all in theme with the Essence pack.

with love, moblu
